7.reason: [The loop condition does not stop at -1; it reads until EOF, causing extra values to be read beyond -1 and leading to incorrect processing of operations.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The loop condition does not stop at -1; it reads until EOF, causing extra values to be read beyond -1 and leading to incorrect processing of operations.]

25.reason: [This should be 'else if' to avoid checking for pop operation immediately after a push; otherwise, when an operation is 1 (push), the next value (the pushed number) might be misinterpreted as an operation (e.g., if it's 0).]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This should be 'else if' to avoid checking for pop operation immediately after a push; otherwise, when an operation is 1 (push), the next value (the pushed number) might be misinterpreted as an operation (e.g., if it's 0).]

27.reason: [k starts at 0 and is decremented after pop, so empty stack is when k == 0, not k == -1. This causes incorrect "error" output only after underflow has already occurred.]
